title: helianthemum pilosum var. pergamaceum
intro: Helianthemum pilosum var. pergamaceum, also known as rockrose or sun rose, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it a potential remedy for wound healing, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum pilosum var. pergamaceum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its flowers can be used as a natural dye and for their ornamental value.
